name: Mailpit (SMTP)
description: Email and SMTP testing tool for developers with a web interface.

aws.parity: Send over plain SMTP locally (captured by Mailpit) exactly as you will to the SES SMTP endpoint — same MIME, headers and auth.
aws.deploy: Verify a domain/identity in SES and point your SMTP host/port/credentials at the SES SMTP relay.

variables.label: SMTP Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the SMTP server.

variables.label: Web Interface Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the Mailpit web interface.
